field_size.description: Number of runners in the race

handicap_weight.description: Weight carried in pounds (-1 if missing)

days_since_last_run.description: Calendar days since horse's previous start

horse_win_rate_last_5.description: Win rate in horse's last 5 starts

horse_place_rate_last_5.description: Top-3 rate in horse's last 5 starts

jockey_win_rate_last_30d.description: Jockey win rate in last 30 calendar days

trainer_win_rate_last_30d.description: Trainer win rate in last 30 calendar days

class_change.description: Today's class minus last-start class (positive = dropped in class)

distance_suit.description: Horse win rate at this distance ±100m

going_suit.description: Horse win rate on this going category

speed_figure_last.description: Sectional-derived speed figure from last start (distance/time)
